title: Junior Frontend Developer at Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
We at Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
